description: Performance & Caching Package (packages/performance) - Complete performance infrastructure with 15 modules: multi-layer cache (L1 LRU, L2 distributed, L3 CDN), cache invalidation strategies, request deduplication, connection pooling, query optimizer, response compression, lazy loading, virtual scroll, code splitting, bundle analyzer, Web Vitals metrics, resource preloading, service worker generator, background sync, memory leak detection.
steps: Create packages/performance/src/types.ts with all interfaces: CacheConfig, CacheEntry, CacheLayer, LRUConfig, DistributedCacheConfig, CDNCacheConfig, InvalidationStrategy, DeduplicationConfig, PendingRequest, ConnectionPoolConfig, PooledConnection, QueryPlan, QueryOptimization, CompressionConfig, LazyLoadConfig, VirtualScrollConfig, ScrollState, CodeSplitConfig, ChunkInfo, BundleMetrics, WebVitalsMetrics, PreloadHint, ServiceWorkerConfig, SyncQueueItem, MemorySnapshot, LeakReport (200+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/lru-cache.ts - LRUCache class with doubly-linked list implementation, O(1) get/put, size-based eviction, TTL support, hit/miss ratio tracking, cache warming (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/multi-layer-cache.ts - MultiLayerCache class with L1 (in-memory LRU), L2 (distributed simulation with sharding), L3 (CDN with edge locations), read-through/write-through, cache coherence protocol (350+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/cache-invalidation.ts - CacheInvalidator class with TTL-based, event-driven, tag-based invalidation, stampede prevention (singleflight), probabilistic early expiration, dependency tracking (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/request-deduplicator.ts - RequestDeduplicator class with concurrent request coalescing, promise sharing, configurable key generation, timeout handling, circuit breaker integration (250+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/connection-pool.ts - ConnectionPool class with min/max connections, health checking, connection recycling, wait queue, connection affinity, graceful drain (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/query-optimizer.ts - QueryOptimizer class with query plan analysis, index suggestion, N+1 detection, query batching, slow query logging, explain plan simulation (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/compression.ts - CompressionEngine class with gzip simulation (Huffman coding concept), brotli simulation, content-type detection, threshold-based compression, streaming compression (250+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/lazy-loader.ts - LazyLoader class with intersection observer simulation, placeholder rendering, progressive loading, priority queues, preconnect hints (200+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/virtual-scroll.ts - VirtualScroll class with viewport calculation, overscan, variable-height items, scroll anchoring, recycled DOM pool simulation, momentum scrolling (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/code-splitter.ts - CodeSplitter class with dynamic import tracking, route-based splitting, shared chunk extraction, preload graph, waterfall prevention (250+ lines)
Create packages/performance/src/core/bundle-analyzer.ts - BundleAnalyzer class with module size tracking, tree-shaking simulation, duplicate detection, size budgets, trend reporting (250+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/web-vitals.ts - WebVitalsCollector class with FCP, LCP, FID, CLS, TTFB measurement simulation, percentile calculation, alerting thresholds, attribution (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/resource-preloader.ts - ResourcePreloader class with link rel=preload/prefetch/preconnect generation, priority hints, fetch priority, critical path detection (200+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/service-worker-gen.ts - ServiceWorkerGenerator class with cache strategies (cache-first, network-first, stale-while-revalidate), precache manifest, runtime caching rules, offline fallback (300+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/background-sync.ts - BackgroundSyncQueue class with IndexedDB simulation, retry with exponential backoff, conflict resolution, bandwidth detection, batch sync (250+ lines)

Create packages/performance/src/core/memory-leak-detector.ts - MemoryLeakDetector class with heap snapshot comparison, growth rate analysis, object retention graph, WeakRef tracking, circular reference detection (250+ lines)
Create packages/performance/src/index.ts barrel export with all 15 modules and all types
acceptance_criteria: packages/performance/src/ contains 17 TypeScript files (types + 15 core modules + index)
LRU cache implements actual doubly-linked list with O(1) operations
Multi-layer cache demonstrates real cache coherence between layers
Virtual scroll calculates actual viewport positioning with variable heights
Web Vitals collector implements percentile calculation algorithms
Running node scripts/test.js passes with new package detected
verification: find packages/performance -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 17 files
wc -l packages/performance/src/core/*.ts should show 4000+ total lines
findings: Created 18 files (types.ts + 16 core modules + index.ts) with 7327 total lines. LRU cache uses actual doubly-linked list with O(1) operations. Virtual scroll uses binary search for finding items at offset. Web Vitals calculates real percentiles using sorted arrays with linear interpolation. Test script passes (only validates the original 15 packages in requiredPackages array, but scans all package files). All core modules are 300-550 lines with complete implementations.
